ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "type_of_show" TEXT /* Type of show (e.g., Music, Comedy, Variety) */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the show */,
  "length" TEXT /* Length of the show */,
  "timeslot" TEXT /* Timeslot when the show airs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the show */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the show (e.g., active, inactive, on hiatus) */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the producer of the show */,
  "recording_location" TEXT /* Location where the show is recorded */,
  "audience_size" INTEGER /* Average number of listeners */,
  "last_aired" TEXT /* Date the show was last aired */,
  "next_aired" TEXT /* Date the show is scheduled to air next */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent genre (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the host */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the host */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the host joined the station */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the host is currently active */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the host's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Host's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_hosts" (
  "show_host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show-host relationship */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the host in the show (e.g., primary, co-host) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_hosts_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_hosts_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "episodes" (
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each episode */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the episode belongs to */,
  "episode_number" INTEGER /* Episode number within the show */,
  "air_date" TEXT /* Date the episode aired */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the episode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the episode */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date the episode was recorded */,
  "episode_status" TEXT /* Status of the episode (e.g., recorded, edited, aired) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the episode */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the episode file in MB */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the episode (e.g., compliant, under review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_episodes_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode the segment belongs to */,
  "segment_number" INTEGER /* Segment number within the episode */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the segment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the segment */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment */,
  "segment_type" TEXT /* Type of the segment (e.g., music, interview, ad) */,
  "segment_status" TEXT /* Status of the segment (e.g., recorded, edited, aired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segments_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the guest */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the guest first appeared on the show */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the guest's profile image */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Guest's social media handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_guests" (
  "segment_guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment-guest relationship */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the guest in the segment (e.g., interviewer, interviewee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_guests_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "song_title" TEXT /* Title of the song */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Artist of the song */,
  "album" TEXT /* Album the song is from */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the song was released */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the song */,
  "song_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the song */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the song has explicit content */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the song has been played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segment_songs" (
  "segment_song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment-song relationship */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "play_time" TEXT /* Time the song was played in the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_songs_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_segment_songs_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Rating value (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text for the episode */,
  "listener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listener who gave the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_listener_id FOREIGN KEY ("listener_id") REFERENCES listeners ("listener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listeners" (
  "listener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listener */,
  "listener_name" TEXT /* Name of the listener */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the listener */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the listener */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the listener */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the listener */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the listener */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the listener joined */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Last date the listener was active */,
  "is_subscriber" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listener is a subscriber */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Listener's subscription plan (e.g., free, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listener_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listener_ratings" (
  "listener_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listener-rating relationship */,
  "listener_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listener */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listener_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listener_ratings_listener_id FOREIGN KEY ("listener_id") REFERENCES listeners ("listener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listener_ratings_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., host, producer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_archive" (
  "archive_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each archived content */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the episode */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the archived content */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the archived content in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the content was uploaded */,
  "legal_status" TEXT /* Legal status of the content (e.g., compliant, under review) */,
  "archived_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who archived the content */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the archived content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("archive_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_archive_archived_by FOREIGN KEY ("archived_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_archive_episode_id FOREIGN KEY ("episode_id") REFERENCES episodes ("episode_id")
)
